title: Caterpillar stock jumps to lead the Dow's gainers after IRS settlement included no penalties
text: Shares of Caterpillar Inc. CAT, +3.08% climbed 3.3% in morning trading Friday, enough to pace the Dow Jones Industrial Average's DJIA, +0.56% gainers, after the construction and mining equipment maker said the settlement reached wit the U.S. Internal Revenue Service included no penalty payments. The stock's price gain of $5.97 was adding about 39 points to the Dow's price, while the Dow rallied 200 points, or 0.6%.
